news.t: Defiance Launches RCAX: The First 2X Long ETF for Red Cat Holdings, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: RCAX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 38.72%, Red Cat Holdings Inc.-Swap-Nbcb-L at 35.32%, RED CAT HLDGS SWAP MAREX-L at 33.24%, Red Cat Holdings Inc.-Swap-Jnst-L at 33.24%, and RED CAT HLDGS SWAP CS-L at 32.48%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long RCAT ETF (RCAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (ticker: RCAT), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. RCAX was launched on Feb 2, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches RCAX: The First 2X Long ETF for Red Cat Holdings, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, Feb. 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs is proud to announce the launch of the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RCAT ETF (RCAX) , expanding its lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs design...
